findings.evidence: Lemmas take {K L : Type*} [Field K] [Field L] [Algebra K L]; namespace TauCeti.IntermediateField; existing TauCeti/FieldTheory/IntermediateField/Quadratic.lean uses the same namespace and import Mathlib.FieldTheory.IntermediateField.Adjoin.Basic.
findings.fix: Move both generic lemmas to TauCeti/FieldTheory/IntermediateField/ (e.g. Adjoin.lean) and import that here; keep only ncard_setOf_exists_root_natDegree_le_abs_intCoeff_le in SimpleGenerators.lean.
findings.issue: finite_setOf_exists_mem_eq_adjoin and ncard_setOf_exists_mem_eq_adjoin_le are generic over arbitrary [Field K] [Field L] [Algebra K L] with no number-theory dependency, and use namespace TauCeti.IntermediateField — the same namespace/import as the generic file TauCeti/FieldTheory/IntermediateField/Quadratic.lean. They are misplaced in a NumberTheory/EffectiveBounds roadmap file.

findings.evidence: Body calls Polynomial.bUnion_roots_finite (../mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Polynomial/Roots.lean:596) and Set.ncard_image_le (../mathlib/Mathlib/Data/Set/Card.lean:826); neither module is in the import list.
findings.fix: Add direct imports of the Mathlib modules whose lemmas this file uses.
findings.issue: Polynomial.bUnion_roots_finite (Mathlib.Algebra.Polynomial.Roots) and Set.ncard_image_le/Set.finite_Icc (Mathlib.Data.Set.Card) are used directly but only reach the file transitively via CardRootSetUnion.

summary: The two generic IntermediateField cardinality lemmas are fully field-theoretic (arbitrary K/L, namespace TauCeti.IntermediateField) and belong in the existing TauCeti/FieldTheory/IntermediateField/ home, not in a NumberTheory/EffectiveBounds file. Only the bounded-coefficient specialization is EffectiveBounds-specific.
